programs.title: FIA Formula E World Championship Racing
programs.description: The grid battles high-grip concrete of the 15-turn Tempelhof circuit. Drivers must manage high tire wear over 1.45 miles of racing. Following a podium finish in 2025, Mitch Evans looks for a victory to propel Jaguar up the 2026 championship table.
